name: garyx-desktop
description: Garyx macOS app powered by the Garyx API channel
author: Garyx

scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:packaged && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --config.mac.identity=null --publish never && npm run install:app
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build:packaged && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --dir --config.mac.identity=null --publish never && npm run install:app
scripts.test:unit: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/main/gary-client.test.mjs src/shared/desktop-state.test.mjs src/shared/transcript-sync.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/agent-options.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/components/side-tools-panel-model.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/components/task-forest-layout.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/components/thread-task-tree-popover-model.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/desktop-route.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/diagnostics-helpers.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/gateway-errors.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/image-generation-content.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/loading-labels.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/pending-inputs.test.mjs src/renderer/src/app-shell/thread-activity.test.mjs src/renderer/src/bot-console-controller.test.mjs src/renderer/src/bot-console-model.test.mjs src/renderer/src/composer-model-control.test.mjs src/renderer/src/conversation-state-conformance.test.mjs src/renderer/src/message-machine.test.mjs src/renderer/src/thread-avatar.test.mjs src/renderer/src/thread-model.test.mjs src/renderer/src/render-view-model.test.mjs src/renderer/src/message-markdown-preprocess.test.mjs src/renderer/src/provider-usage.test.mjs src/renderer/src/task-notification.test.mjs
